title: Agile Operating Model Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Agile Operating Model skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

current_organizational_chart.description: Current organizational chart and reporting structure, including spans of control

inventory_active_delivery.description: Inventory of active delivery initiatives and programs with ownership mapping

product_service_portfolio.description: Product or service portfolio with identification of customer-facing value streams

current_delivery_methodology.description: Current delivery methodology documentation (e.g., waterfall stage-gate, PMO charters, project governance policies)

employee_engagement_team.description: Employee engagement or team health survey data indicating collaboration barriers

existing_okr_kpi.description: Existing OKR or KPI frameworks in use across teams or business units
